project.name: SWF Capital Intelligence Dashboard
project.summary: A Claude artifact-based dashboard that provides sovereign wealth funds with pre-due-diligence investment intelligence on countries and sectors. The demo shows a Poland analysis for ADIA (Abu Dhabi Investment Authority) with economic health scores, FDI screening requirements, tax treaty details, sector liquidity signals, and regulatory scrutiny levels sourced from WSE/GPW, PwC, White & Case, and A&O Shearman. It's a working interactive artifact with real structured data.

project.name: MonkCard — Physical NFC Card App Blocker
project.summary: MonkCard is a live product at monkcard.com consisting of a physical NFC card paired with a mobile app that locks distracting apps (TikTok, Instagram, etc.) until the card is tapped. The website shows pricing (S$25–S$39), product photos, user testimonials, and a purchasing flow. The tweet also references two larger prior projects (NFT loans marketplace with $450K/day revenue peak, and a Telegram mini-app with $10M revenue) though those lack direct links.
